1759.reason: Error: When encountering a single '!' at the end of a line, the code incorrectly outputs "=" with ASSIGN type instead of "!" with NOT type. This is a copy-paste error from the '=' handling block.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: When encountering a single '!' at the end of a line, the code incorrectly outputs "=" with ASSIGN type instead of "!" with NOT type. This is a copy-paste error from the '=' handling block.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When encountering a single '!' at the end of a line, the code incorrectly outputs an ASSIGN token ("=") instead of a NOT token ("!"). This is a copy-paste error from the '=' handling block.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  Error: Should be "!" with NOT, not "=" with ASSIGN. This produces wrong token when '!' is alone at end of line.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect token string and type for single '!'; should be "!" and TokenType.NOT
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect token string and type for single '!'; should be "!" and TokenType.NOT
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Should create NOT token "!" instead of ASSIGN token "=" for single '!']

1775.reason: [Should add single "&" token with error, not "&&" token. Also should not add any AND token when encountering single '&']

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  Error: Should not add a token with two '&' when only one is present. The token should not be produced, or if produced, it should reflect the single '&'. This incorrectly adds a double '&&' token.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect token string for single '&'; should be "&" instead of "&&"
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect token string for single '&'; should be "&"
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Should not create AND token for single '&' - should only report error 'a' without adding valid token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Should add single "&" token with error, not "&&" token. Also should not add any AND token when encountering single '&']

1786.reason: [Should add single "&" token with error, not "&&" token. When single '&' is found, it should be treated as an invalid symbol and trigger error 'a', but not produce an AND token]
